description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the silkeh/clang Docker image (default) and php:7-cli-alpine for the pages job, with stages test, deploy, and fuzz. In the test stage define build_ap, build_filetest, build_tests, build_wizard, create_project, and run_tests jobs; each runs apt-get update and installs libasound2-dev libglu1-mesa-dev freeglut3-dev libglfw3-dev libgles2-mesa-dev (create_project also installs xvfb), then executes cmake and make for the respective directories, builds both default and Debug configurations, and create_project additionally runs xvfb-run ./wizard create test_project followed by building the generated test_project. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that uses php:7-cli-alpine, installs doxygen, ttf-freefont and graphviz via apk, runs doxygen on the doc folder, moves the generated html to public, and publishes the public directory as an artifact only on the master branch. Add three fuzzing jobs (fuzz_csv, fuzz_tga, fuzz_wav) in the fuzz stage that extend the .fuzz_base template, use silkeh/clang, install git and the same libraries plus xvfb, set CC and CXX to clang, prepare a corpus directory, configure and build the fuzz tests with AddressSanitizer, and run ./gitlab-cov-fuzz with the appropriate binary, exposing COVFUZZ_SEED_CORPUS variables. Include the SAST job from the security template with SAST_EXCLUDED_ANALYZERS set to semgrep.
